unsubscribe-title: Page title and HTML title of [[Special:Unsubscribe]].
unsubscribe-confirm: Text shown on the GET confirmation page. $1 is the recipient's email address.
unsubscribe-button: Label of the submit button that performs the unsubscribe.
unsubscribe-done: Success message shown after a human confirms the unsubscribe.
unsubscribe-invalid: Error shown when the user id is unknown or the HMAC token does not verify.
